overrideJustification: 32/33 assertions passed. VAL-NAV-007 (hash state preservation during round-trip navigation) deferred to misc-fixes. Fix was attempted (hash included in buildNavUrl per unit tests) but page initialization resets hash on navigation. All primary state (filters, time range, domain, domainkey) is preserved — only the facet drill-down hash is lost, which is a minor UX issue.
